commentary_text: The model favors Canada at 41%, while the market favors Switzerland at 44%. The largest single gap appears on the Canada win outcome, where the model assigns 13 percentage points more probability than the sportsbooks. This divergence could reflect recent form disparities, lineup changes, or injury news that the model has not incorporated since its last update, whereas real-money markets may have priced in such developments. The dashboard surfaces this conflict as a signal worthy of scrutiny, not as evidence that either source has misread the match.
